message:
fix: improve RaptorQ decoder memory efficiency and fix logic bugs

Optimize RaptorQ decoder to avoid unnecessary symbol clones and fix
subtle bugs in pivot selection and wavefront initialization.

Memory optimizations:
- Change decode() and decode_wavefront() to take owned Vec<ReceivedSymbol>
  instead of &[ReceivedSymbol] — decoder consumes input, no extra copy
- Remove symbol.clone() calls in equation building (move instead)

Correctness fixes:
- select_pivot_row(): fix variable shadowing bug where cross_block_nnz
  was being overwritten with best_cross in comparison logic
- decode_wavefront(): fix initialization of active_cols/solved from l
  (all columns) to k (source symbols only) for correct matrix sizing
- Cache test: explicitly set fingerprint match before comparison

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
